line.issue: Extension "monitoring" is having an ext_emconf.php file, which is deprecated. Additionally the composer.json is missing "version" and "providesPackages" declaration. See https://docs.typo3.org/permalink/changelog:deprecation-108345-1774126701@14.3 for details.

Extension "monitoring" is having an ext_emconf.php file, which is deprecated. Additionally the composer.json is missing "version" and "providesPackages" declaration. See https://docs.typo3.org/permalink/changelog:deprecation-108345-1774126701@14.3 for details.
